{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un redsi/ es dshwoon
eet/ nn Jimaetu Metanijus De
eelsch Mizpas/ ka es preeksch	u nokaut/ ka netweens to fin
teen Kaldeëreem kalpojn/ kas pee	Kapehz buhtu winsch tew
mums nahk/ tad nu sakrahjeet	Dshwibu atnehmis/ un wis
juhs Wihnu/ un Waffarajus/	Juhda/ kas uhs tewim fapul
un Etji/ un leezeek to juhtds	najtchees/ taptu iskaifita/ un t
Trankds/ un dshwojeet juhsu	Attikkschee noJuhda eetu bohj
Pilefahtds/ ko juhs efät uhs-
jechnuischt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad arridsan wiſfi Judi/
kas eekfch Moabu/ un starp A-
mona Behrueem/ un eekfch Ee-
doma/ un wiffäs tannis Walstäs
bija/ dsirdeja/ ka tas Kehnisch
no Babeles eekfch Juhda zittus
btj attlizzinajs/ un Gedaliju Ai-
kama Dehlu/ ta Dehla Sawa-
na/ pahr teem btj eezeblis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad greesahs wiſfi Judi
no wiffahm Weetahm atpaklast/
kurp tee btj aisdsihti/ un nahze
uhs to Semmi Juhda pee Ge-
daliju uhs Mizpu/ un tee fa-
frabje warren dauds Wihnu/ un
Waffarajus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Joannas Karens
Dehls/ un wiſfi Karza Ahwersti/
kas Laukä turrejahs/ nahze pee
Gedaliju uhs Mizpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fazzija us winnu:
Sinni tu gann / ka Baalis to
Aminona Behrnu Kehnisch /
Jsimaelu to Dehlu Metanijus irr
juhtijs tew to Dshwibu atjemt?
Bet Gedalijus Aikama Dehls
ne tizzeja winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr Joannas Kare-
us Dehls runnaja uhs Gedaliju
paſſeppeni eekfch Mizpas/ un
Luid luhsams manni
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Gedalijus Aikama
Dehls fazzija uhs Joannas
Karens Dehlu: Ne darri fc
Leetu/ jo tu runna nepqteeſi u
Jsimaeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XLI. Nodalla.
Ismaels nokauj Gedaliju : 2. Lihds ar k
seem Judeem eekfch Mizpas 3. Un w
astondefmits Wihrus/ kas uhs ta Ku
GA Mannmu ett gribb: 5/7. Gribb te
zittus atliffufchus Laudis Zeetuma we
10. Kas tomehr no Joanna lohp atsfro
binati: 11. etc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Et septita Mehna
nahze Ismaels Netan
jus Dehls/ ta Del
Elisama/ no Kehnixa Dstimu
ma/ un ta Kehnixa Wirfne
lihds ar defimits Wihreem /
Gedaliju Aikama Dehlu u
Mizpu/ un tee ehde tur Ma
kohpa eekfch Mizpas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ismaels Netantja
Dehls zehlahs ar teem defini
Wihreem/ kas pee winna bij
un kawe Gedaltju Aikama De
lu/ ta Dehla Sawana ar So
binn/ ta nokawe winsch to/
tas Kehnisch no Babeles
pahr to Semmi eezeblis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiﬀus Indus ka
Ismaels/ kas ar winnu/ pro
ar Gedaltju eekfch Mizpas bij
un tohs Kaldeerus/ kas tur atr
"
    }
  ],
